$comment: Lumivara Forge purchase-flow intake form. Phase 1 design — see docs/storefront/09-purchase-flow.md §2. Field names map 1:1 to docs/mothership/07-client-handover-pack.md YAML keys so a Phase-2 executor can render the form and pipe answers straight into the per-client handover render. Section ordering reflects the on-screen flow (identity → engagement → site → brand → content → integrations → migration → meta).

fields.name: client_slug
fields.label: Slug for your project (lowercase, hyphenated)
fields.why_we_ask: Used as the GitHub repo name and the Vercel project name. Defines the URL of every internal artefact.

fields.name: client_name
fields.label: Business name (display)
fields.why_we_ask: The brand name we display on the site, in the footer, and in handover correspondence.

fields.name: client_legal_name
fields.label: Legal entity name (for contract & invoices)
fields.why_we_ask: Goes on the contract and the Stripe invoice. Often differs from the display name (e.g. a numbered Ontario Inc. operating as the brand).

fields.name: client_descriptor
fields.label: One-line description of what you do
fields.why_we_ask: Drives the meta description, OpenGraph card, and the home-page hero. Plain English, not jargon.

fields.name: client_location
fields.label: Primary city / region
fields.why_we_ask: Local SEO signal and contact-page copy. We do not collect a street address at intake.

fields.name: client_primary_email
fields.label: Your primary email (for sign-in & contracts)
fields.why_we_ask: The magic-link login for /admin and the contact email on the contract. Must be the email you actually read.

fields.name: client_primary_phone
fields.label: Phone number (for SMS edits + urgent contact)
fields.why_we_ask: Allowlisted for the SMS-in lane on Tier 1+ and used as the urgent-issue contact. Optional for Tier 0.

fields.name: tier
fields.label: Service tier
fields.why_we_ask: Drives setup-fee amount, Stripe price IDs, included edits, and SLA hours. The 'help me choose' quiz writes a recommendation here that the prospect can override.
fields.open_decision: Tier ladder reconciliation — `02-pricing-tiers.md` ships 4 tiers (0-3); the live `/lumivara-infotech` page ships 3 (Launchpad/Growth/Bespoke). The intake schema follows `02-pricing-tiers.md` since that is the canonical operator doc; the on-site copy must reconcile in Phase 2.

fields.name: primary_cta
fields.label: What is the ONE thing you want a visitor to do?
fields.why_we_ask: Anchors the hero CTA and every internal link. Per 01-gig-profile §7 question 3 — the most-asked intake question.

fields.name: domain
fields.label: Domain you want the site to live at
fields.why_we_ask: Drives the Vercel domain config, Resend sub-domain, and the canonical URL in every meta tag.

fields.name: registrar
fields.label: Where is the domain registered?
fields.why_we_ask: Determines DNS-handover steps (07-client-migration-strategy §3.5). 'I haven't bought one yet' kicks off a domain-purchase add-on.

fields.name: page_list
fields.label: Pages you want at launch
fields.why_we_ask: Defines the IA. Defaults seeded from the per-tier page-count cap (Tier 0 = 3 pages, Tier 1 = 5, Tier 2 = 7, Tier 3 = unlimited but bounded at intake).

fields.name: voice_adjectives
fields.label: Three words for your brand voice
fields.why_we_ask: Drives copy tone in AI-assisted draft generation. Per 01-gig-profile §7 question 4.

fields.name: mood_adjectives
fields.label: Three words for your visual mood
fields.why_we_ask: Drives palette and typographic choices. Per 01-gig-profile §7 question 5.

fields.name: reference_sites
fields.label: Three websites you like the look of (with one-sentence why)
fields.why_we_ask: Calibrates design direction faster than adjectives alone. Per 01-gig-profile §7 question 7.
sample: linear.app — confident voice, dark mode polish
fields.open_decision: No matching key in 07-client-handover-pack.md today. Either add `reference_sites` to the handover schema (preferred — useful future reference) or drop this from the intake. Strawman: add it.

fields.name: logo_assets
fields.label: Logo files (optional upload)
fields.why_we_ask: Lets us start brand work in parallel with copy. Optional — we can refer a logo designer if you don't have one.

fields.name: existing_copy
fields.label: Existing copy / content (optional upload)
fields.why_we_ask: If you've written about your business anywhere, share it. We polish what you give us; we don't ghostwrite from scratch.

fields.name: integrations
fields.label: Tools you want wired in
fields.validation: 0-N entries; per-tier eligibility enforced in Phase-2 UI
fields.why_we_ask: Tier 0 includes none. Tier 1 includes Cal.com or one equivalent. Tier 2 unlocks Resend + chat. Tier 3 unlocks the full set + one custom CRM webhook (per 02-pricing-tiers.md).

fields.name: have_existing_site
fields.label: Do you have a website today?
options: Yes — I'm happy with it (Path A: keep & integrate)
Yes — I want a new one (Path B: full migration)
Yes — keep some of it, replace some (Hybrid)
fields.why_we_ask: Routes to the migration playbook in 07-client-migration-strategy.md. Path A/B/Hybrid each unlock different downstream questions in Phase 2.
fields.open_decision: Per the plan, do Path A prospects use the same intake form or a slimmer variant? Recommendation: same schema; this field controls which downstream sections render (e.g. the migration sub-form for Path B/Hybrid only).

fields.name: existing_site_url
fields.label: URL of your current site (if any)
fields.why_we_ask: Lets us run the source-platform catalog (07-client-migration-strategy §1) and quote migration effort.

fields.name: existing_site_platform
fields.label: What is your current site built on?
fields.validation: one of the listed options — required iff have_existing_site != 'No'
fields.why_we_ask: Determines whether Path A's script-injection lane is available (per 07-client-migration-strategy §1).

fields.name: wants_discovery_call
fields.label: Want a 30-minute discovery call before paying?
fields.why_we_ask: Routes Tier 2 / Tier 3 prospects to the optional Cal.com slot. Tier 0 / Tier 1 default to self-serve unless explicitly requested.

fields.name: notes
fields.label: Anything else we should know?
fields.why_we_ask: Catch-all for context that doesn't fit a field — accessibility needs, deadlines, stakeholders. Surfaces in the operator's onboarding pack.
fields.sample: Bilingual EN/FR site requested in month 3.

fields.name: consent_terms
fields.label: I agree to the terms of service and the cancellation / refund policy.
fields.why_we_ask: Click-to-sign acceptance for the contract step (§5 of 09-purchase-flow.md). The signed PDF is emailed to the operator and the client by the e-sign tool.

handover_keys_not_collected_at_intake.reason: Issued by operator after Cal.com slot creation.
Constant per the brand-domain banner in docs/storefront/README.md.
